name: TEKKEN 7
description: Discover the epic conclusion of the long-time clan warfare between members of the Mishima family. Powered by Unreal Engine 4, the legendary fighting game franchise fights back with stunning story-driven cinematic battles and intense duels that can be enjoyed with friends and rivals.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7/8/10 (64-bit OS required)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-4160 @ 3.60GHz or equivalent
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 2GB, GTX 750Ti 2GB, or equivalent
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 60 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX compatible soundcard or onboard chipset
comment1: Really fun game, but having no tutorial is unacceptable.
comment2:
This was a fun time. I am not the best Tekken player, and never will be. 
But it was fun little time playing online/offline, customizing characters.
I couldn't find tournament match much, which I couldn't make it "perfect game" .. but well it is what it is
Still not the bad game :)
comment3: I could spend hundreds of hours with friends and it’ll still be fun. Damn good party game even though its a 1v1 fighting game
